issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or 'StartOfTurn', not 'OnBlock'. The effect grants Blocker as a static ability when the condition is met, not in response to blocking.
Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (cards attached to this character), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!! cards). The card text says 'given DON!! cards' meaning DON!! attached to this character.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have a total of 2 or more given DON!! cards, this Character gains [Blocker].
